yogurt-mousse-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt Mousse
instructions: Put all the gelatine leaves down in cold water for 5 minutes, then drain them and melt them in a sea bath or microwave without letting them boil.
In a bowl, whip the cream into thick whipped cream. Add condensed milk and strawberry yoghurts and stir gently until well mixed. Add melted gelatin and mix well.

Lay down the previous mixture for a hole form previously passed by cold water and lead to cold until it is well solidified. Before serving, dip the shape in hot water, peel carefully and serve cold and tastefully decorated.
